identity.name: NDR — DNS Tunneling EAL Validation
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-NDR-002. Plane: NDR. Primary technique: T1048.003. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-NDR-002. Plane: NDR. Primary technique: T1048.003. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-NDR-002.
UC: DNS Anomaly Detection via NGFW EAL / TC: High-Entropy Subdomain Burst Detection.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-NDR-002 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Inspect DNS tunnel plugin params schema
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe dns_tunnel_exfil
# step-2: Launch live DNS tunneling campaign — A queries with high-entropy labels
cat > /tmp/dns-tunnel-live.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-NDR-002
name: "NDR validation — DNS tunnel live"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - testmynids.org
dry_run: false
tags: [ndr, dns-tunnel, eal]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: dns_tunnel_exfil
    params:
      base_domain: testmynids.org
      chunks: 30
      chunk_size_bytes: 24
      sleep_seconds: 1.0
      encoding: base32
      query_type: A
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/dns-tunnel-live.yml --live
# step-3: Repeat with TXT query type to exercise TXT-burst analytics
cat > /tmp/dns-tunnel-txt.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-NDR-002
name: "NDR validation — DNS tunnel TXT"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - testmynids.org
dry_run: false
tags: [ndr, dns-tunnel, eal]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: dns_tunnel_exfil
    params:
      base_domain: testmynids.org
      chunks: 25
      chunk_size_bytes: 32
      sleep_seconds: 0.5
      encoding: base64
      query_type: TXT
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/dns-tunnel-txt.yml --live
